truthAudit.Summary: Non-blind truth audit of Run 2 against enhanced_calc.cpp source and the 20-item ground truth. Run 2 identified 10 of the 20 true vulnerabilities with accurate line-level evidence. It missed 9 vulnerabilities (integer overflow, heap overflow, insecure temp file, persistent auth state, unhandled exception, integer underflow, unbounded recursion, data race in cache, TOCTOU). Three findings were misclassified with incorrect CWE identifiers. Three additional real vulnerabilities (admin exec injection, result-buffer sprintf overflow, override-audit injection) were reported but fall outside the supplied ground-truth list.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format-string injection at lines 237-238 with exact evidence quoting printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input). Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 contains no mention of factorial computation, integer overflow, or the result *= i loop at line 317. The vulnerability is completely absent from the previous findings.
Run 2 correctly flagged the use-after-free in stage_deferred_history_flush, citing memory pool allocation and async lambda execution. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 correctly identified command injection via ConfigLoader::validate_config with exact evidence. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression using strcpy when length >= buffer size. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 correctly identified the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter::increment where value_ is read outside the lock. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 correctly identified the logic bomb/backdoor authentication mechanism. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 correctly identified path traversal in ConfigLoader::load_config. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 contains no mention of the ExpressionParser heap overflow or the unchecked strcpy(expression_buffer_, expr_str.c_str()) at line 376. The vulnerability is completely absent.
Run 2 correctly identified hardcoded admin credentials. Matches the ground truth anchor.
Run 2 correctly identified weak PRNG session tokens. Matches the ground truth anchor. (CWE misclassified as CWE-330 instead of CWE-338, noted in corrections.)
Run 2 identified the thread-unsafe localtime usage and static cache. Matches the vulnerability but misclassifies CWE as CWE-479 instead of CWE-362. Found_partial.

Run 2 Finding 5 covers command injection in the override audit but does not identify the insecure temporary file handling (TEMP/TMPDIR env vars + supercalc_emergency.log + system()). The temp-file aspect is completely absent.
Run 2 does not mention persistent authentication state across sessions or the combination of authenticated_, login_attempts_, and session_token_ persisting beyond intended scope.
Run 2 contains no mention of the unhandled std::stod exception in handle_variable_command at line 729.
Run 2 contains no mention of the integer underflow risk in MemoryPool::allocate where previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES could underflow if previous_size is small.
Run 2 contains no mention of unbounded recursion in the expression parser (parse_expression -> parse_factor -> PAREN_OPEN -> parse_expression).
Run 2 contains no mention of the data race on result_cache_ accessed without cache_mutex_ protection while being read/written from thread_pool_->enqueue tasks.
Run 2 Finding 14 covers path traversal but does not identify the TOCTOU race between std::filesystem::exists, sleep_for, and std::ifstream file open.
Run 2 correctly identified integer division by zero in calculate_route_score. Matches the ground truth anchor.
